title: phyllanthus cladotrichus
intro: Phyllanthus cladotrichus, also known as the 'Pahang chestnut' or 'Riddlo', is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cladotrichus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
